import React from 'react'; import './Projects.css'; const Projects = () => { const projects = [ { id: 1, title: "AI-Powered Portfolio", description: "A futuristic portfolio website built with React and AI integration, featuring dynamic content and intelligent interactions.", image: "/api/placeholder/400/300", technologies: ["React", "AI/ML", "JavaScript", "Framer Motion"], category: "AI & Web", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 2, title: "E-commerce Platform", description: "A full-stack e-commerce application with user authentication, product management, and payment integration.", image: "/api/placeholder/400/300", technologies: ["React", "Node.js", "Express", "MongoDB"], category: "Full Stack", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 3, title: "Task Management App", description: "A collaborative task management application with real-time updates and team collaboration features.", image: "/api/placeholder/400/300", technologies: ["React", "Socket.io", "Node.js", "PostgreSQL"], category: "Web Development", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 4, title: "Weather Dashboard", description: "A weather application with location-based forecasts and interactive weather maps.", image: "/api/placeholder/400/300", technologies: ["React", "OpenWeather API", "Chart.js", "CSS3"], category: "Web Development", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 5, title: "Blog Platform", description: "A content management system for blogs with markdown support and admin dashboard.", image: "/api/placeholder/400/300", technologies: ["React", "Node.js", "Markdown", "MongoDB"], category: "Full Stack", link: "#", github: "#" }, { id: 6, title: "API Integration Hub", description: "A centralized platform for managing and testing multiple API integrations with documentation.", image: "/api/placeholder/400/300", technologies: ["Node.js", "Express", "Swagger", "Jest"], category: "Backend", link: "#", github: "#" } ]; return (
